blocks.title: Comment Reply Link
blocks.description: Displays a link to reply to a comment.

blocks.title: Gallery

blocks.description: Create a link that always points to the homepage of the site. Usually not necessary if there is already a site title link present in the header.

blocks.name: core/image
blocks.title: Image
blocks.description: Insert an image to make a visual statement.

blocks.name: core/latest-comments

blocks.description: Display a list of your most recent comments.

blocks.title: Pattern Placeholder

blocks.title: Author

blocks.name: core/post-author-name
blocks.title: Author Name
blocks.description: The author name.

blocks.description: Display a post's comments form.

blocks.title: Content
blocks.description: Displays the contents of a post or page.

blocks.name: core/post-date
blocks.title: Date
blocks.description: Display the publish date for an entry such as a post or page.

blocks.name: core/post-excerpt
blocks.title: Excerpt
blocks.description: Display the excerpt.

blocks.name: core/post-featured-image
blocks.title: Featured Image
blocks.description: Display a post's featured image.

blocks.name: core/post-navigation-link
blocks.title: Post Navigation Link
blocks.description: Displays the next or previous post link that is adjacent to the current post.

blocks.name: core/post-template
blocks.title: Post Template
blocks.description: Contains the block elements used to render a post, like the title, date, featured image, content or excerpt, and more.

blocks.name: core/post-terms
blocks.title: Post Terms
blocks.description: Post terms.

blocks.name: core/post-title
blocks.title: Title
blocks.description: Displays the title of a post, page, or any other content-type.

blocks.name: core/query
blocks.title: Query Loop
blocks.description: An advanced block that allows displaying post types based on different query parameters and visual configurations.

blocks.name: core/query-no-results
blocks.title: No Results
blocks.description: Contains the block elements used to render content when no query results are found.

blocks.name: core/query-pagination
blocks.title: Pagination
blocks.description: Displays a paginated navigation to next/previous set of posts, when applicable.

blocks.name: core/query-pagination-next
blocks.title: Next Page
blocks.description: Displays the next posts page link.

blocks.name: core/query-pagination-numbers
blocks.title: Page Numbers
blocks.description: Displays a list of page numbers for pagination.

blocks.name: core/query-pagination-previous
blocks.title: Previous Page
blocks.description: Displays the previous posts page link.

blocks.name: core/query-title
blocks.title: Query Title
blocks.description: Display the query title.

blocks.name: core/query-total
blocks.title: Query Total
blocks.description: Display the total number of results in a query.

blocks.name: core/read-more
blocks.title: Read More
blocks.description: Displays the link of a post, page, or any other content-type.

blocks.name: core/rss
blocks.title: RSS
blocks.description: Display entries from any RSS or Atom feed.

blocks.name: core/search
blocks.title: Search
blocks.description: Help visitors find your content.

blocks.name: core/shortcode
blocks.title: Shortcode
blocks.description: Insert additional custom elements with a WordPress shortcode.

blocks.name: core/site-logo
blocks.title: Site Logo
blocks.description: Display an image to represent this site. Update this block and the changes apply everywhere.

blocks.name: core/site-tagline
blocks.title: Site Tagline
blocks.description: Describe in a few words what the site is about. The tagline can be used in search results or when sharing on social networks even if it’s not displayed in the theme design.

blocks.name: core/site-title
blocks.title: Site Title
blocks.description: Displays the name of this site. Update the block, and the changes apply everywhere it’s used. This will also appear in the browser title bar and in search results.

blocks.name: core/social-link
blocks.title: Social Icon
blocks.description: Display an icon linking to a social profile or site.

blocks.name: core/tag-cloud
blocks.title: Tag Cloud
blocks.description: A cloud of popular keywords, each sized by how often it appears.

blocks.name: core/template-part
blocks.title: Template Part
blocks.description: Edit the different global regions of your site, like the header, footer, sidebar, or create your own.

blocks.name: core/term-description
blocks.title: Term Description
blocks.description: Display the description of categories, tags and custom taxonomies when viewing an archive.

blocks.name: core/audio
blocks.title: Audio
blocks.description: Embed a simple audio player.

blocks.name: core/buttons
blocks.title: Buttons
blocks.description: Prompt visitors to take action with a group of button-style links.

blocks.name: core/code
blocks.title: Code
blocks.description: Display code snippets that respect your spacing and tabs.

blocks.name: core/column
blocks.title: Column
blocks.description: A single column within a columns block.

blocks.name: core/columns
blocks.title: Columns
blocks.description: Display content in multiple columns, with blocks added to each column.

blocks.name: core/details
blocks.title: Details
blocks.description: Hide and show additional content.

blocks.name: core/embed
blocks.title: Embed
blocks.description: Add a block that displays content pulled from other sites, like Twitter or YouTube.

blocks.name: core/freeform
blocks.title: Classic
blocks.description: Use the classic WordPress editor.

blocks.name: core/group
blocks.title: Group
blocks.description: Gather blocks in a layout container.

blocks.name: core/html
blocks.title: Custom HTML
blocks.description: Add custom HTML code and preview it as you edit.

blocks.name: core/list-item
blocks.title: List Item
blocks.description: An individual item within a list.

blocks.name: core/missing
blocks.title: Unsupported
blocks.description: Your site doesn’t include support for this block.

blocks.name: core/more
blocks.title: More
blocks.description: Content before this block will be shown in the excerpt on your archives page.

blocks.name: core/nextpage
blocks.title: Page Break
blocks.description: Separate your content into a multi-page experience.

blocks.name: core/paragraph
blocks.title: Paragraph
blocks.description: Start with the basic building block of all narrative.

blocks.name: core/preformatted
blocks.title: Preformatted
blocks.description: Add text that respects your spacing and tabs, and also allows styling.

blocks.name: core/pullquote
blocks.title: Pullquote
blocks.description: Give special visual emphasis to a quote from your text.

blocks.name: core/quote
blocks.title: Quote
blocks.description: Give quoted text visual emphasis. "In quoting others, we cite ourselves." — Julio Cortázar

blocks.name: core/separator
blocks.title: Separator
blocks.description: Create a break between ideas or sections with a horizontal separator.

blocks.name: core/social-links
blocks.title: Social Icons
blocks.description: Display icons linking to your social profiles or sites.

blocks.name: core/spacer
blocks.title: Spacer
blocks.description: Add white space between blocks and customize its height.

blocks.name: core/table
blocks.title: Table
blocks.description: Create structured content in rows and columns to display information.

blocks.name: core/text-columns
blocks.title: Text Columns (deprecated)
blocks.description: This block is deprecated. Please use the Columns block instead.

blocks.name: core/verse
blocks.title: Verse
blocks.description: Insert poetry. Use special spacing formats. Or quote song lyrics.

blocks.name: core/video
blocks.title: Video
blocks.description: Embed a video from your media library or upload a new one.

blocks.name: yoast/faq-block
blocks.title: Yoast FAQ
blocks.description: List your Frequently Asked Questions in an SEO-friendly way.

blocks.name: yoast/how-to-block
blocks.title: Yoast How-to
blocks.description: Create a How-to guide in an SEO-friendly way. You can only use one How-to block per post.

blocks.name: yoast-seo/breadcrumbs
blocks.title: Yoast Breadcrumbs
blocks.description: Adds the Yoast SEO breadcrumbs to your template or content.
